overall.description: Gameplay footage from Elden Ring showing a character in a fur cloak ascending through an ancient stone lift mechanism and emerging onto the Altus Plateau at night. The environment transitions from enclosed stone chambers with giant guardian statues to a vast open plateau featuring ancient ruins, glowing celestial towers, and a night sky filled with falling red embers.

character passes between two massive rotating stone wheels held by guardian statues

stone basin with bright orange flames providing illumination

massive rotating stone wheel attached to the right guardian statue

segments.scene_description: The character ascends through an ancient stone lift chamber, passing between two colossal guardian statues holding massive circular shields. Flaming braziers cast warm light against the cool stone architecture as the character approaches the grand gate exit, with the night sky and red particles visible through the archway.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow stone corridor leading from lift to plateau exit

events.description: screen fades to black and transitions to upper lift corridor
character emerges from dark corridor into open night sky with visible stars and red embers
location name 'Altus Plateau' appears on screen along with game UI prompt

agents.ego_description: character moves through narrow stone corridor and steps out onto the plateau, revealing the expansive night sky

entered.detail: tall ancient stone wall with weathered carvings forming the corridor boundary
tall ancient stone wall with weathered carvings forming the corridor boundary
tall glowing structure visible at the end of the corridor, emanating blue-white light

segments.scene_description: Following a transition, the character moves through a narrow stone corridor with the ancient lift tower visible ahead. The scene shifts dramatically as the character emerges into the open air, revealing the night sky filled with falling red embers. The location name 'Altus Plateau' appears as the character steps onto the plateau.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plateau with ancient ruins and glowing celestial towers under starry sky

events.description: character transitions from walking to running across the open plateau

agents.ego_description: character runs across the vast stone plateau, navigating around ancient pillars and observing the landscape of glowing towers and falling red embers

entered.detail: tall cylindrical stone columns scattered across the plateau, some broken or toppled
multiple tall slender towers emitting bright blue-white light, reaching into the night sky
leafless trees with orange-red bark scattered across the plateau landscape
dark blue night sky filled with falling red glowing particles and streaks of light
broken stone structures and debris from ancient architecture

segments.scene_description: The character runs freely across the vast open plateau of Altus Plateau, surrounded by ancient stone pillars and dead orange trees. Multiple glowing celestial towers rise in the distance against a dramatic night sky filled with falling red embers. The environment is completely open with full sky visibility, creating a sense of expansive scale and ancient mystery.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the enclosed depths of an ancient stone lift into the vast, open expanse of the Altus Plateau at night. It begins within a stone chamber, ascending between two colossal guardian statues with shields as flaming braziers cast a warm glow against the cool architecture. As the character approaches a grand gate, the scene shifts through a narrow stone corridor before emerging into the open air under a night sky filled with falling red embers. The environment then expands dramatically as the character runs across the plateau, passing ancient stone pillars and dead orange trees. Finally, the view opens fully to reveal a sense of immense scale, with multiple glowing celestial towers rising in the distance against the ember-strewn sky.
